fields.acceptance_criteria: Split view: raw markdown textarea on left/top, live preview panel on right/bottom rendered by pulldown-cmark+syntect; debounced live preview (not every keystroke); save button PATCHes description via /api/tickets/{id}; unsaved changes indicator; Ctrl+S keyboard shortcut; browser beforeunload guard to prevent navigating away with unsaved changes; this textarea+preview component is reused by the creation form (3e069173)
fields.title: Feature: Description editor — Markdown textarea with live preview
